overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in Western attire walking along mountain trails. The character traverses from a rocky canyon edge through forested paths to open grassland with expansive valley views under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon edge with river view

events.description: character moves away from canyon edge onto forest trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the canyon ridge overlooking the river below, navigating rocky terrain

entered.detail: dense cluster of pine trees lining the left side of the path
deep canyon with river visible far below to the right
rocky outcrops and boulders along the walking path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky canyon edge with a river visible far below to the right. Dense pine forest lines the left side as the character navigates the grassy terrain, transitioning onto a defined dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail with a rock wall on the left side

entered.detail: well-worn dirt path cutting through the mountain terrain
tall rocky cliff face lining the left side of the trail
distant valley visible through gaps in the trees

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through a forested mountain area with a steep rock wall on the left and scattered pine trees. The path is narrow and earthy, with views of distant valleys opening up to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with scattered trees

events.description: emerging from tree cover into direct sunlight on open hillside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail through open grassland with expansive mountain views

entered.detail: distant mountain range visible on the horizon
large boulders and rock formations along the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up onto a wide grassy hillside with sparse tree coverage. The landscape expands to reveal distant mountains and valleys under bright sunlight, with rocky outcrops visible along the left side of the path.

events.description: path begins gradual descent toward the valley below

agents.ego_description: walking downhill toward a wide valley with panoramic views of the landscape ahead

entered.detail: sweeping view of the forested valley and rolling hills below
gentle grass-covered slopes extending into the distance
dense forest covering the valley floor in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final stretch of the trail descends toward a vast valley overlook. The path cuts through open grassland with panoramic views of rolling hills and distant forests ahead, framed by scattered pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged mountain path that transitions from a high canyon edge into a narrow forested trail. It begins with the character navigating grassy terrain beside a rocky precipice, with a river flowing far below to the right and a dense pine forest bordering the left. As the character moves forward, the open grass gives way to a defined dirt trail that winds deeper into the mountain landscape. The scene then shifts as the path narrows, pressing against a steep rock wall on the left while scattered pine trees frame the route. Finally, the camera follows the earthy trail as it curves, revealing expansive views of distant valleys opening up to the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a rocky hillside into a vast, panoramic valley overlook. It begins as the path opens onto a wide grassy slope with sparse tree coverage, revealing distant mountains and rocky outcrops under bright sunlight. As the camera continues forward, the landscape expands further, shifting from the hillside to a descending trail that cuts through open grassland. The scene then opens into a wide vista of rolling hills and distant forests, framed by scattered pine trees, before finally reaching the edge of the expansive valley overlook.
